title: Unified Restaurant Health Inspection
description: Generated from schema/inspection_schema.yaml (v0.1.0). Do not edit by hand — run `python -m inspections.schema_gen`.

schema_version.description: Semver (major.minor.patch) of the unified schema this record conforms to. Shape-constrained but not pinned to one value, so a mixed-version batch stays valid and a consumer can select the matching schema per record.

inspection_uuid.description: Deterministic UUIDv5 (namespace + source + natural inspection key). Idempotent: re-running the pipeline yields the same id, so loads are safe to repeat (ADR 0007).

establishment_uuid.description: Deterministic UUIDv5 (namespace + source + facility/permit id). Groups inspections of one place. Cross-source / renamed-establishment identity is out of scope (ADR 0005).

source.description: Which source system produced the record.

source_inspection_id.description: Natural inspection identifier as it appears (or is composed) in the source.

source_establishment_id.description: Native facility/permit id used to key the establishment (NY operation id, LA FACILITY ID, ABQ permit #).

postal_code.description: ZIP; null where the source omits it (e.g. ABQ)

address.description: Structured street address (a deliberate upgrade from the flat-string draft; see ADR 0008).

inspection_type.description: Source-native inspection type/service (routine, reinspection, field visit, etc.).

inspection_result.description: Normalized outcome. Thin pass/fail via fixed per-source rules (ADR 0001). See result_basis.

result_basis.description: Plain-language explanation of HOW inspection_result was derived (transparency for reporters).

score.description: Native numeric score where the regulator publishes one (LA: 0-100). Null when N/A.

grade.description: Native letter grade where published (LA: A/B/C). Null when N/A.

critical_violation_count.description: Count of critical/priority violations where derivable. Null when the source does not distinguish.

total_violation_count.description: Total violations recorded for the inspection where derivable.

violations.description: Per-violation detail. MAY be empty (clean inspection, or ABQ summary-only per ADR 0004).

population.description: County population snapshot; null = flagged for refresh

enrichment_note.description: Set when FIPS/population could not be resolved

ingested_at.description: When this normalized record was produced by the transform stage (UTC).
